options.text: Primarily one Deck Team with Ch.Off. goes forward & one deck team with 2nd.Off. goes aft.
Deck Crew goes forward and Eng.Crew goes aft
Mooring & Unmooring is done by shore people
Deck crew without any officer goes Forward & Aft

explanation: During mooring and unmooring operations, the ship typically deploys designated deck teams, often led by officers. For example, the Chief Officer might lead one team while the Second Officer leads another, covering different parts of the vessel as needed.
